name: Fire King Avatar Garunix
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ガルドニクス
desc: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Fire King Avatar" monster from your Deck.
mnst_eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Fire King Avatar" monster from your Deck.
eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can Special Summon 1 "Fire King Avatar" monster from your Deck.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
